name: io.studiomeyer/academy
title: StudioMeyer Academy
description: Free Memory-First AI Operator course as an MCP server. Bundled curriculum, no account needed.

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Academy API key from studiomeyer.academy/dashboard/keys. Without it: free account-free mode (full curriculum). With it: adds progress/quizzes/certificates over stdio.
environmentVariables.name: ACADEMY_API_KEY
